_comment: 스켈레톤 밴드 정체성 고정 블록. 모든 패널 프롬프트에 반드시 포함.
_style_note: 고유 캐릭터 스타일. 특정 상용 캐릭터(스폰지밥, 곰돌이푸 등) 직접 참조 금지. 아래 설명어로 동일한 귀엽고 단순한 cartoon 미감을 구현.

identity_block.band_description: the same original fantasy skeleton music band, rendered in a simple rounded Western cartoon style with thick bold outlines and flat bright colors

members.vocalist: the same skeleton vocalist with a simple round skull, large circular hollow eye sockets with neon magenta inner glow, holding a decorative concert microphone, chubby rounded body proportions
members.guitarist: the same skeleton guitarist on the left, simple geometric skull shape, large glowing hollow eye sockets, rounded stubby limbs, playful exaggerated pose
members.bassist: the same skeleton bassist on the right, round chubby skull, simple flat cartoon body, large round hollow eye sockets softly glowing
members.drummer: the same skeleton drummer in the background, simple rounded skull, exaggerated comic motion lines while drumming, stubby round arms

identity_block.stage: the same colorful stylized cyberpunk city concert stage, drawn in simple flat cartoon style
identity_block.moon: the same massive glowing neon magenta moon, perfectly round and simple like a giant flat circle glowing in the sky
identity_block.costume: simple flat cartoon stage outfits in dark colors with bright neon magenta accents, rounded costume details, no complex shading
identity_block.palette: flat bright colors — deep black base, neon magenta highlights, vivid pop color accents

art_style_anchor.base: simple rounded Western cartoon style — thick bold black outlines, flat bright cel colors, large round hollow eye sockets with neon glow, chubby geometric body shapes, minimal detail, clean and friendly character design
art_style_anchor.proportions: chubby rounded proportions — large round skull, short stubby limbs, soft rounded edges on everything, no sharp angles on characters
art_style_anchor.line_art: thick bold black outlines, same line weight throughout, simple clean edges — classic flat cartoon aesthetic
art_style_anchor.color: flat bright colors with no gradients on characters — deep black base, neon magenta accent glow, vivid solid color fills
art_style_anchor.expression_style: very exaggerated simple expressions — round hollow eye sockets convey emotion through inner glow intensity and simple brow-like skull shapes, manga-style sparkle and sweat drop effects
art_style_anchor.background: simple flat stylized backgrounds — colorful but not photorealistic, cartoon cyberpunk world

style_anchor_webtoon: Simple rounded cartoon style. Skeleton characters are charming, friendly, and funny — not scary. Think classic Western animation meets Korean webtoon panel layout. Original character design, not based on any existing IP.
negative_rules: Do not redesign the band members.
Do not change the skeleton music band identity.
Do not change the neon magenta moon world.
Do not create a different band.
Do not make the band members human.
Do not make characters scary, gothic, or horror-themed — keep them cute and charming.
Do not add weapons or violent props.
Do not use realistic rendering or complex shading — keep flat cartoon style.
Do not reference or imitate any specific copyrighted cartoon characters (SpongeBob, Winnie the Pooh, etc.) — use original character descriptions only.
No complex details on characters — keep shapes simple and rounded.
No text, no watermark, no logo.
reference_note: Always attach the reference images from the reference folder when using this prompt.
